texto: Gerdanlouk, he thinks. An evocative Turkish word, with Arabic roots. It means jewelry, but only jewelry adorning a woman between her lower neck and the top of her breasts. Gerdanlouk. He looks away.
explicacao: Citação de Jenny White sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Gerdanlouk, he thinks. An evocative Turkish word, with Arabic roots. It means jewelry, but only j…” articula reflexao, desire, gerdanlouk em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
